title: A Machine Learning Approach Capturing Hidden Parameters in Autonomous Thin-Film Deposition

methodology.approach: Machine learning (ML) integration with physical vapor deposition (PVD)
methodology.key_challenge: Sensitivity to noise in training data and hidden parameters causing irreproducibility

system_architecture.automation_feature: Fully automated system with high sample throughput

learning_cycle: Identification of growth condition with highest model uncertainty
testing_cycle: Prediction of optimal growth condition that minimizes loss function

key_innovation: Mechanism to account for hidden parameter variations in thin film deposition
